debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
k : Fin n
S : List (Call n)
h : isExpert (after n S) k
⊢ n - 1 < S.length

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, (after (S.take i)) k ⊆ (after (S.take (i + 1))) k := by
    intro i
    apply makeCalls_monotone
  have h₄ : (after S) k = (after (S.take S.length)) k := by simp
  rw [h₄] at h₁
  have h₅ : (after (S.take 0)) k = {k} := by simp
  have h₆ : ∀ i, (after (S.take i)) k ⊆ (after (S.take (i + 1))) k := h₃
  have h₇ : Set.ncard ((after S) k) = n := by
    rw [h₁]
    simp
  have h₈ : Set.ncard ((after (S.take 0)) k) = 1 := by
    rw [h₅]
    simp
  have h₉ : ∀ i, Set.ncard ((after (S.take i)) k) ≤ Set.ncard ((after (S.take (i + 1))) k) := by
    intro i
    apply Set.ncard_mono
    apply h₆
  have h₁₀ : ∀ i, Set.ncard ((after (S.take (i + 1))) k) ≤ Set.ncard ((after (S.take i)) k) + 1 := by
    intro i
    cases' S.get? i with c
    · simp
    · simp_all [makeCall, Set.ncard_insert_of_not_mem]
      <;> omega
  calc
    n = Set.ncard ((after S) k) := h₇.symm
    _ ≤ Set.ncard ((after (S.take 0)) k) + S.length := by
      induction S.length with
      | zero => simp_all
      | succ m ih =>
        calc
          Set.ncard ((after (S.take (m + 1))) k) ≤ Set.ncard ((after (S.take m)) k) + 1 := h₁₀ m
          _ ≤ (Set.ncard ((after (S.take 0)) k) + m) + 1 := by linarith [ih]
          _ = Set.ncard ((after (S.take 0)) k) + (m + 1) := by ring
    _ = 1 + S.length := by rw [h₈]
    _ = S.length + 1 := by ring
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ (σ : List (Call n)), (after σ) k ⊆ univ := by
    intro σ; exact Set.subset_univ _
  have h₄ : ∀ (σ : List (Call n)), (after σ).length ≤ σ.length + n := by
    intro σ
    induction σ with
    | nil => simp [initialState, after]
    | cons c σ ih =>
      simp_all [after, makeCalls, initialState]
      -- Each call can add at most one new secret to each participant
      -- So total knowledge size increases by at most 2 per call
      -- But we only track one agent k, so at most 1 new secret per call involving k
      -- However, we can use a simpler argument: to learn n-1 other secrets,
      -- k must be in at least n-1 calls
  -- Direct argument: k starts knowing only their own secret.
  -- In each call that k participates in, they can learn at most one new secret
  -- (actually possibly more if the other party knows multiple, but in worst case 1)
  -- But actually, even better: the number of secrets k knows is at most 1 + v S k
  -- where v S k is the number of calls k participates in
  have h₅ : (after S) k ⊆ {k} ∪ (Finset.univ.filter (λ i => ∃ j, j ∈ S.take (S.length) ∧ (j.fst = k ∨ j.snd = k))) := by
    -- Instead, use the standard argument: each call involving k can increase
    -- the number of secrets k knows by at least 1 (if the other party has something new)
    -- But to be rigorous without extra lemmas, use:
    sorry

have h₁ : (after S) k k := h k
  have h₂ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) k i := h
  have h₃ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h₄
    have h₅ : S.length < n - 1 := h₄
    have h₆ : (after S).length ≤ S.length + 1 := by
      simp [after, makeCalls, initialState]
      induction S <;> simp_all [List.length]
    have h₇ : n ≤ S.length + 1 := by
      linarith
    linarith
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ s ∈ S, ∃ i j, s = ⟨i, j⟩ := by
    intro s hs
    cases s
    exact ⟨_, _, rfl⟩
  have h₄ : ∀ t, t ⊆ Set.univ := Set.subset_univ
  have h₅ : (after S) k = List.foldl (fun st c => makeCall st c) (initialState n) S k := rfl
  clear h₅
  induction S with
  | nil =>
    simp_all
    have : n ≤ 1 := by
      rw [← Set.card_singleton k]
      calc
        n = Set.card (Set.univ : Set (Fin n)) := by simp
        _ = Set.card ({k} : Set (Fin n)) := by rw [h₁]; simp
        _ = 1 := by simp
    omega
  | cons c S ih =>
    simp_all [makeCalls, List.foldl]
    have : (makeCall (after S) c) k = Set.univ := h₁
    cases' c with i j
    by_cases h₆ : k = i <;> by_cases h₇ : k = j <;> simp_all [makeCall, Function.update]
    all_goals
      have : (after S) k ⊆ Set.univ := Set.subset_univ
      have : Set.univ ⊆ (after S) i ∪ (after S) j := by
        rw [← h₁]
        simp_all [makeCall, Function.update]
      have : (after S) i ∪ (after S) j = Set.univ := by
        apply Set.eq_of_subset_of_subset
        · assumption
        · apply Set.subset_univ
      have : Set.card ((after S) i ∪ (after S) j) = n := by
        rw [this]
        simp
      have : Set.card ((after S) i) + Set.card ((after S) j) ≥ n := by
        calc
          _ ≥ Set.card ((after S) i ∪ (after S) j) := by apply Nat.le_add_of_nonneg_left; apply Nat.zero_le
          _ = n := by assumption
      have : Set.card ((after S) i) ≤ n ∧ Set.card ((after S) j) ≤ n := by
        constructor <;> apply Set.card_le_of_subset <;> apply Set.subset_univ
      omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h₁
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h_gt
    have h₇ : S.length < n - 1 := h_gt
    have h₈ : (after S) k ≠ Set.univ := by
      -- Each call can add at most one new secret to k's knowledge
      -- Starting from 1 secret, after S.length calls, k knows at most S.length + 1 secrets
      -- If S.length < n - 1, then S.length + 1 < n, so k cannot know all n secrets
      have h₉ : (after S) k ⊆ {i | i < n ∧ i ≤ k.val + S.length} := by
        induction S with
        | nil => simp [initialState]
        | cons c S' ih =>
          simp [makeCalls, List.foldl]
          -- This would require more detailed reasoning about how secrets propagate
          -- But we can use a simpler counting argument
          sorry
      sorry
    contradiction
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : Set.ncard ((after S) k) = n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₆ : ∀ T : List (Call n), Set.ncard ((after T) k) ≤ T.length + 1 := by
    induction T with
    | nil => simp [initialState]
    | cons c T ih =>
      simp_all [makeCalls, after]
      cases c.fst.eq_or_ne k, c.snd.eq_or_ne k <;> simp_all [Set.ncard_insert_of_not_mem]
      <;> omega
  linarith [h₆ S, h₅]

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ (σ : List (Call n)), (after σ) k ⊆ univ := by
    intro σ; exact Set.subset_univ _
  have h₄ : ∀ (σ : List (Call n)), (after σ).length ≤ σ.length + n := by
    intro σ
    induction σ with
    | nil => simp [initialState, after]
    | cons c σ ih =>
      simp_all [after, makeCalls, updateState]
      apply Nat.le_of_add_le_add_left
      apply Nat.le_succ_of_le
      exact ih
  have h₅ : (after S) k = univ → n ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    intro h_expert
    have h_size : (after S) k = univ → (after S) k.ncard = n := by
      intro h_univ
      rw [h_univ, Set.univ_ncard]
    have h_mono : (initialState n) k ⊆ (after S) k := by
      apply initialState_subset_after
    have h_card : (initialState n) k.ncard ≤ (after S) k.ncard := by
      apply Set.ncard_mono h_mono
    simp at h_card
    have h_final : (after S) k.ncard ≤ S.length + 1 := by
      apply ncard_after_le_calls_plus_one
    linarith
  have h₆ : n ≤ S.length + 1 := h₅ h₁
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ (initialState n) k := by
    apply initialState_le_after
  have h₅ : (after S) k \ (initialState n) k = {i | i < n ∧ i ≠ k} := by
    ext i
    simp [h₁, h₂]
  have h₆ : ((after S) k \ (initialState n) k).card = n - 1 := by
    rw [h₅]
    exact Finset.card_filter_of_ne (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)) k
  have h₇ : ∀ c ∈ S, ((after (S.take (List.indexOf c S))) k).card ≤ ((after (S.take (List.indexOf c S + 1))) k).card := by
    intro c hc
    apply card_le_card
    apply after_subset_after_cons
  have h₈ : ((after S) k).card ≤ ((initialState n) k).card + S.length := by
    calc
      ((after S) k).card = ((initialState n) k).card + ((after S) k \ (initialState n) k).card := by
        rw [Finset.card_union_add_card_diff (initialState n k) (after S k)]
        apply Finset.subset_union_left
      _ = 1 + (n - 1) := by rw [h₂, h₆]; simp
      _ = n := by simp
      _ ≤ 1 + S.length := by
        have : n ≤ 1 + S.length := by
          linarith [h₆, h₁]
        linarith
  linarith [h₆, h₈]

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ s ∈ S, ∃ a b, s = (a, b) := by
    intro s hs
    cases s
    exact ⟨_, _, rfl⟩
  have h₄ : ∀ t, t ⊆ (after S) k → t.card ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    intro t ht
    induction S with
    | nil => simp_all
    | cons c S' IH =>
      simp_all [makeCalls, after]
      -- Each call can add at most one new secret to an agent's knowledge
      sorry
  have h₅ : Set.univ.card = n := by
    simp [Set.univ_eq_univ]
  have h₆ : ({k.val} : Set ℕ).card = 1 := by
    simp
  have h₇ : n ≤ S.length + 1 := by
    apply h₄
    rw [h₁]
    apply Set.subset_univ
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by

  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h₁
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_sub_eq_zero
    sorry
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : ∀ i, i < n → ∃ t ≤ S.length, i ∈ (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take t)) k := by
    intro i hi
    use S.length
    simp [h₁, hi]
  have h₅ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro hgt
    have h₆ : S.length < n - 1 := hgt
    have h₇ : (after S) k ⊆ {k.val} ∪ (Finset.image (fun c => c.fst.val) (Finset.range S.length).image (fun i => S.get? i |>.getD default))
      ∪ (Finset.image (fun c => c.snd.val) (Finset.range S.length).image (fun i => S.get? i |>.getD default)) := by
      -- Each call can add at most one new secret to k's knowledge
      sorry
    sorry
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Finset.univ.val := by
    ext i
    simp [h₃]
  have h₅ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h₁
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h_gt
    have h₇ : S.length < n - 1 := h_gt
    have h₈ : (after S) k ⊆ {k.val} ∪ S.bind (fun c => if c.fst = k then {c.snd.val} else if c.snd = k then {c.fst.val} else ∅) := by
      induction S with
      | nil => simp [initialState, makeCalls]
      | cons c S' ih =>
        simp [makeCalls, Function.update, after]
        cases c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k <;> simp_all [Set.insert_subset_iff]
        <;> aesop
    have h₉ : (({k.val} ∪ S.bind (fun c => if c.fst = k then {c.snd.val} else if c.snd = k then {c.fst.val} else ∅))).card ≤ 1 + S.length := by
      calc
        (({k.val} ∪ S.bind (fun c => if c.fst = k then {c.snd.val} else if c.snd = k then {c.fst.val} else ∅))).card
          ≤ ({k.val}).card + (S.bind (fun c => if c.fst = k then {c.snd.val} else if c.snd = k then {c.fst.val} else ∅)).card := by
            apply Set.card_union_le
        _ ≤ 1 + (S.bind (fun c => if c.fst = k then {c.snd.val} else if c.snd = k then {c.fst.val} else ∅)).card := by simp
        _ ≤ 1 + S.length := by
          calc
            (S.bind (fun c => if c.fst = k then {c.snd.val} else if c.snd = k then {c.fst.val} else ∅)).card
              ≤ S.length := by
                apply Finset.card_bind_le
                intro c _
                by_cases c.fst = k <;> by_cases c.snd = k <;> simp_all
            _ ≤ S.length := by rfl
    have h₁₀ : n ≤ 1 + S.length := by
      calc
        n = Set.univ.card := by simp [Set.univ_eq_finset_univ]
        _ = (after S) k.card := by rw [h₅]
        _ ≤ (({k.val} ∪ S.bind (fun c => if c.fst = k then {c.snd.val} else if c.snd = k then {c.fst.val} else ∅))).card := by
            apply Set.card_mono h₈
        _ ≤ 1 + S.length := h₉
    linarith
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, (after (S.take i)) k ⊆ (after (S.take (i + 1))) k := by
    intro i
    apply gossip_monotonic_left
  have h₄ : (after S) k = List.foldl (fun s c => gossip s c) (initialState n) S k := rfl
  have h₅ : (List.foldl (fun s c => gossip s c) (initialState n) S) k = univ := h₁
  have h₆ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₇ : ∀ T : List (Call n), (after T) k ⊆ Finset.univ := by
    intro T
    apply Finset.subset_univ
  have h₈ : (after S) k = univ → S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    intro h_expert
    apply gossip_lower_bound
    exact h_expert
  have h₉ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := h₈ h₁
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i ∈ univ := by simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k := by simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k ⊇ Finset.univ := by simp [h₁]
  have h₆ : (after S) k = Finset.univ := by ext i; simp [h₁]
  have h₇ : (List.foldl (makeCall ·) (initialState n) S) k = Finset.univ := by rw [after, h₆]
  have h₈ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h_gt
    have h₉ : S.length < n - 1 := h_gt
    have h₁₀ : (List.foldl (makeCall ·) (initialState n) S) k ⊆ {k} ∪ Finset.biUnion (Finset.univ.filter (λ i => i ≠ k)) (λ i => {i}) := by
      induction S with
      | nil => simp
      | cons c cs IH =>
        simp_all [makeCall, Finset.insert_eq_of_mem]
    have h₁₁ : (List.foldl (makeCall ·) (initialState n) S) k ⊆ Finset.univ := by
      apply Finset.subset_univ
    have h₁₂ : (List.foldl (makeCall ·) (initialState n) S) k ≠ Finset.univ := by
      have h₁₃ : Finset.card ((List.foldl (makeCall ·) (initialState n) S) k) ≤ S.length + 1 := by
        induction S with
        | nil => simp
        | cons c cs IH =>
          simp_all [makeCall, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
          omega
      have h₁₄ : Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)) = n := by simp
      have h₁₅ : S.length + 1 < n := by omega
      have h₁₆ : Finset.card ((List.foldl (makeCall ·) (initialState n) S) k) < n := by linarith
      have h₁₇ : Finset.card ((List.foldl (makeCall ·) (initialState n) S) k) ≠ n := by linarith
      simp_all
    contradiction
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ s ∈ S, ∃ a b, s = (a, b) := by
    intro s hs
    cases s
    exact ⟨_, _, rfl⟩
  have h₄ : ∀ t : List (Call n), (after t) k ⊆ Set.univ := by
    intro t
    apply Set.Subset.univ
  have h₅ : (after S) k = (initialState n) k ∪ (⋃ i ∈ S.toFinset, 
    match i with
    | (a, b) => if k = a then (after (S.take (S.indexOf i))) b else 
                if k = b then (after (S.take (S.indexOf i))) a else ∅) := by
    sorry
  have h₆ : (after S) k ⊇ {i | i < n} := by
    rw [h₁]
    simp
  have h₇ : (after S) k = {i | i < n} := by
    ext i
    constructor <;> intro hi <;> simp_all [Fin.val_mk]
  have h₈ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₉ : ∀ i ∈ S, (after (S.take (S.indexOf i + 1))) k ⊇ (after (S.take (S.indexOf i))) k := by
    intro i hi
    cases i
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState]
    apply Set.Subset.trans
    · apply Set.Subset.refl
    · apply Set.Subset.trans
      · apply Set.Subset.refl
      · apply Set.Subset.refl
  have h₁₀ : (after S) k ⊇ {k.val} := by
    apply Set.Subset.trans
    · apply Set.Subset.refl
    · apply Set.Subset.trans
      · apply Set.Subset.refl
      · apply Set.Subset.refl
  have h₁₁ : (after S) k = {i | i < n} := h₇
  have h₁₂ : Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)) = n := by
    simp
  have h₁₃ : Set.ncard (after S) k = n := by
    rw [h₁₁]
    simp [Set.ncard_Iio]
  have h₁₄ : Set.ncard (initialState n) k = 1 := by
    simp [initialState]
  have h₁₅ : ∀ i ∈ S, Set.ncard (after (S.take (S.indexOf i + 1))) k ≤ 
    Set.ncard (after (S.take (S.indexOf i))) k + 1 := by
    intro i hi
    cases i
    simp [after, makeCalls, initialState]
    apply Nat.le_succ_of_le
    apply Set.ncard_mono
    apply Set.Subset.trans
    · apply Set.Subset.refl
    · apply Set.Subset.trans
      · apply Set.Subset.refl
      · apply Set.Subset.refl
  have h₁₆ : Set.ncard (after S) k ≤ Set.ncard (initialState n) k + S.length := by
    calc
      Set.ncard (after S) k ≤ Set.ncard (initialState n) k + S.length := by
        induction S with
        | nil => simp
        | cons c cs IH =>
          simp_all [after, makeCalls, List.length]
          linarith
      _ = 1 + S.length := by rw [h₁₄]
  linarith

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k \ (initialState n) k = Set.univ \ {k.val} := by
    ext i
    simp [h₁, h₂]
  have h₆ : (Set.univ \ {k.val}).Nonempty ↔ n > 1 := by
    simp [Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
    constructor
    · intro h_nonempty
      rcases h_nonempty with ⟨i, hi⟩
      contrapose! hi
      simp_all
    · intro h_gt
      use 0
      simp_all
  have h₇ : S.foldl (λ st c => makeCall st c) (initialState n) = after S := rfl
  have h₈ : (after S) k = (S.foldl (λ st c => makeCall st c) (initialState n)) k := rfl
  clear h₇ h₈
  induction S with
  | nil =>
    simp_all
    have : n ≤ 1 := by
      intro h_contra
      have h_mem : k.val ∈ (after []) k := by
        simp_all
      simp_all
    omega
  | cons c S' IH =>
    simp_all [makeCalls, List.foldl]
    cases' Nat.lt_or_ge n 2 with h_lt h_ge
    · omega
    · have h_card : ((after S') k).card ≤ (S'.length + 1) := by
        induction S' with
        | nil => simp_all
        | cons c' S'' IH' =>
          simp_all [makeCalls, List.foldl]
          have : (makeCall (after S'') c') k ⊆ (after S'') k ∪ (after S'') c'.snd ∪ (after S'') c'.fst := by
            intro x hx
            simp_all [makeCall, Function.update]
          have : ((after S'') k ∪ (after S'') c'.snd ∪ (after S'') c'.fst).card ≤ (after S'') k.card + (after S'') c'.snd.card + (after S'') c'.fst.card := by
            apply Nat.le_of_sub_le_sub_right
            simp_all [Nat.add_assoc]
          omega
      omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h₁
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h_gt
    have h₇ : S.length < n - 1 := h_gt
    have h₈ : (after S) k ⊆ {i | i ≤ k.val + S.length} := by
      induction S with
      | nil => simp [initialState, makeCalls]
      | cons c S ih =>
        simp [makeCalls, List.foldl, Function.comp] at *
        cases c
        simp_all [Set.insert, Set.union]
        omega
    have h₉ : Set.univ ⊆ {i | i ≤ k.val + S.length} := by
      rw [← h₅]
      exact h₈
    have h₁₀ : n - 1 ≤ k.val + S.length := by
      have h₁₁ : (n - 1 : Nat) ∈ Set.univ := by
        apply Nat.lt_succ_self
      have h₁₂ : (n - 1 : Nat) ≤ k.val + S.length := by
        apply h₉
        exact h₁₁
      exact h₁₂
    omega
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ s ∈ S, ∃ i j, s = (i, j) := by
    intro s hs
    cases s
    exact ⟨_, _, rfl⟩
  have h₄ : ∀ t : List (Call n), (after t) k ⊆ Set.univ := by
    intro t
    apply Set.Subset.refl
  have h₅ : (after S) k = (initialState n) k ∪ (⋃ c ∈ S, if k = c.fst ∨ k = c.snd then (after (S.take (S.indexOf c))) c.fst ∪ (after (S.take (S.indexOf c))) c.snd else ∅) := by
    -- This equality is complex to prove directly; instead use monotonicity of knowledge
    sorry
  -- Instead use a simpler argument: each call can increase the knowledge of k by at most one new secret
  have h₆ : ∀ t : List (Call n), (after t).k.card ≤ 1 + (t.filter (λ c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k)).length := by
    induction t with
    | nil => simp [initialState, after]
    | cons c t ih =>
      simp [after, makeCalls, List.foldl, Function.comp] at *
      cases' eq_or_ne k c.fst with h_eq h_ne <;> cases' eq_or_ne k c.snd with h_eq2 h_ne2 <;>
        simp_all [Set.insert_subset_iff, Nat.succ_le_iff]
      <;> omega
  have h₇ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₈ : (after S) k.card = n := by
    rw [h₇]
    simp
  have h₉ : 1 + (S.filter (λ c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k)).length ≥ n := by
    linarith [h₆ S, h₈]
  have h₁₀ : (S.filter (λ c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k)).length ≤ S.length := by
    apply List.length_filter_le
  have h₁₁ : 1 + S.length ≥ n := by
    linarith [h₉, h₁₀]
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i ∈ univ := by simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k := by simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : ∀ i, ∃ t ≤ S.length, i ∈ (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take t)) k := by
    intro i
    use S.length
    simp [h₁]
  have h₆ : ∀ i ≠ k, ∃ c ∈ S, k = c.fst ∨ k = c.snd := by
    intro i hi
    cases' h₅ i with t ht
    induction t with
    | zero => simp_all
    | succ t ih =>
      cases' S.get? t with c
      · simp_all
      · simp_all [makeCalls, Function.update]
        omega
  have h₇ : S.countP (λ c => k = c.fst ∨ k = c.snd) ≥ n - 1 := by
    have h₈ : Finset.card (Finset.univ.erase k) = n - 1 := by
      simp [Finset.card_erase_of_mem]
    have h₉ : ∀ i ∈ Finset.univ.erase k, ∃ c ∈ S, k = c.fst ∨ k = c.snd := by
      intro i hi
      exact h₆ i (Finset.not_mem_erase.mp hi)
    calc
      S.countP (λ c => k = c.fst ∨ k = c.snd)
        ≥ (Finset.univ.erase k).card := by
          apply Finset.card_le_card_of_inj_on
          · intro i hi j hj hij
            simp_all
          · intro i hi
            rcases h₉ i hi with ⟨c, hc, hk⟩
            use c
            simp_all
      _ = n - 1 := h₈
  have h₈ : S.length ≥ S.countP (λ c => k = c.fst ∨ k = c.snd) := by
    apply List.countP_le_length
  linarith

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Finset.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (List.foldl (fun st c => makeCall st c) (initialState n) S) k = Set.univ := h₁
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
    apply Nat.lt_of_sub_pos
    have h₇ : (after S) k ≠ (initialState n) k := by
      simp [h₁, h₂]
      exact fun h_contra => by
        have h₈ : Set.univ = {k.val} := h_contra
        have h₉ : ∃ i, i ≠ k.val ∧ i < n := by
          cases n
          case zero => contradiction
          case succ n =>
            cases n
            case zero => contradiction
            case succ n =>
              use 0
              constructor
              · intro h_eq
                have h_fin : k.val < 2 := by
                  simpa using k.prop
                omega
              · omega
        rcases h₉ with ⟨i, hi₁, hi₂⟩
        have h₁₀ : i ∈ Set.univ := by simp
        have h₁₁ : i ∉ {k.val} := by simp [hi₁]
        contradiction
    have h₈ : S.length > 0 := by
      intro h_len
      simp [h_len] at h₅
      contradiction
    have h₉ : ∀ (T : List (Call n)), T.length ≤ n - 2 → ¬ isExpert (after T) k := by
      intro T hT
      have h₁₀ : (after T) k ⊆ {i | i ≤ k.val + T.length} := by
        induction T
        case nil => simp [initialState]
        case cons c T ih =>
          simp [after, makeCalls, List.foldl, makeCall]
          have h₁₁ : (after T) k ⊆ {i | i ≤ k.val + T.length} := ih (by omega)
          have h₁₂ : (makeCall (after T) c) k ⊆ {i | i ≤ k.val + T.length + 1} := by
            cases c
            simp [makeCall]
            cases' eq_or_ne c_fst k with h_eq h_ne <;> cases' eq_or_ne c_snd k with h_eq' h_ne' <;>
              simp_all [Set.insert_subset, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
            <;> omega
          omega
      have h₁₁ : (after T) k ≠ Set.univ := by
        have h₁₂ : ∃ i, i < n ∧ i ∉ (after T) k := by
          use min (k.val + T.length + 1) (n - 1)
          constructor
          · omega
          · intro h_mem
            have h₁₃ : min (k.val + T.length + 1) (n - 1) ≤ k.val + T.length := by
              simp_all
            omega
        rcases h₁₂ with ⟨i, hi₁, hi₂⟩
        intro h_eq
        have h₁₃ : i ∈ Set.univ := by simp
        have h₁₄ : i ∈ (after T) k := by rw [h_eq]; simp
        contradiction
      intro h_expert
      contradiction
    have h₁₀ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
      contrapose! h₉
      omega
    omega
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Finset.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ (σ : List (Call n)), (after σ) k ⊆ Finset.univ := by
    intro σ; exact Finset.subset_univ _
  have h₄ : ∀ (σ : List (Call n)), (after σ).length ≤ σ.length + n := by
    intro σ
    induction σ with
    | nil => simp [after, initialState]
    | cons c σ ih =>
      simp_all [after, makeCalls, updateCall]
      apply Nat.le_of_add_le_add_left
      omega
  have h₅ : Finset.card ((after S) k) = n := by
    rw [h₁]; exact Finset.card_univ
  have h₆ : Finset.card ((initialState n) k) = 1 := by
    simp [initialState]
  have h₇ : ∀ (σ : List (Call n)), Finset.card ((after σ) k) ≤ 1 + σ.length := by
    intro σ
    induction σ with
    | nil => simp [after, initialState]
    | cons c σ ih =>
      simp_all [after, makeCalls, updateCall]
      cases' c with a b
      cases' decEq a k with ha ha <;> cases' decEq b k with hb hb <;>
        simp_all [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      all_goals omega
  linarith [h₅, h₆, h₇ S]

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ {i | i < n} := by
    intro i hi
    simp at hi
    simp [h₁, hi]
  have h₅ : (after S) k ≠ (initialState n) k := by
    intro h_contra
    simp [h₂] at h_contra
    have h₆ : n ≤ 1 := by
      apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
      intro h_gt
      cases n
      · simp_all
      · cases n
        · simp_all
        · have h₇ : 2 ≤ n + 2 := by linarith
          have h₈ : (1 : Fin (n + 2)) ≠ 0 := by simp
          simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
    have h₇ : n - 1 < 0 := by
      omega
    simp_all
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h_gt
    have h₇ : S.length < n - 1 := h_gt
    have h₈ : (after S) k ⊆ {i | i = k ∨ ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i ∨ c.snd = k ∧ c.fst = i} := by
      induction S with
      | nil => simp [initialState, makeCalls]
      | cons c S' IH =>
        simp [makeCalls, after, List.take_append, List.length_cons]
        cases c
        simp [Call, Function.update, Function.comp]
        aesop
    have h₉ : (after S) k ⊆ {i | i = k ∨ ∃ j, j ∈ S.map (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd else if c.snd = k then c.fst else k)} := by
      aesop
    have h₁₀ : (after S) k ⊆ {i | i = k ∨ i ∈ S.map (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd else if c.snd = k then c.fst else k)} := by
      aesop
    have h₁₁ : (S.map (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd else if c.snd = k then c.fst else k)).length = v S k := by
      simp [v, List.countP, List.map]
    have h₁₂ : (S.map (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd else if c.snd = k then c.fst else k)).length ≤ S.length := by
      apply List.length_map_le
    have h₁₃ : v S k ≤ S.length := by
      linarith
    have h₁₄ : (after S) k ⊆ insert k (S.map (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd else if c.snd = k then c.fst else k)).toFinset := by
      aesop
    have h₁₅ : (after S) k ⊆ Finset.insert k (Finset.image (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd else if c.snd = k then c.fst else k) S.toFinset) := by
      aesop
    have h₁₆ : (after S) k.card ≤ 1 + v S k := by
      calc
        (after S) k.card ≤ (Finset.insert k (Finset.image (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd else if c.snd = k then c.fst else k) S.toFinset)).card := by
          apply Finset.card_le_card
          apply h₁₅
        _ ≤ 1 + (Finset.image (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd else if c.snd = k then c.fst else k) S.toFinset).card := by
          simp
        _ ≤ 1 + v S k := by
          simp [h₁₁]
    have h₁₇ : n ≤ 1 + v S k := by
      calc
        n = (after S) k.card := by
          rw [h₁]
          simp
        _ ≤ 1 + v S k := h₁₆
    have h₁₈ : v S k ≥ n - 1 := by
      omega
    have h₁₉ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
      calc
        S.length ≥ v S k := by
          simp [v]
          apply List.countP_le_length
        _ ≥ n - 1 := h₁₈
    omega
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.range (Fin.val : Fin n → ℕ) := by
    apply Set.ext
    intro x
    simp
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h_gt
    have h₇ : S.length < n - 1 := h_gt
    have h₈ : (after S) k ⊆ {k.val} ∪ (Finset.image (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd.val else c.fst.val)
      (Finset.filter (fun c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) S.toFinset)).toSet := by
      induction S with

      | cons c S' ih =>

        cases c
        simp [Call]
        have h₉ : (after S') k ⊆ {k.val} ∪ (Finset.image (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd.val else c.fst.val)
          (Finset.filter (fun c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) S'.toFinset)).toSet := ih
        have h₁₀ : (after (c :: S')) k = (after S') k ∪ (after S') c.fst ∪ (after S') c.snd := by
          simp [makeCalls, Function.update]
        have h₁₁ : (after S') c.fst ⊆ Set.univ := Set.subset_univ _
        have h₁₂ : (after S') c.snd ⊆ Set.univ := Set.subset_univ _
        simp_all
    have h₉ : (after S) k ⊆ {k.val} ∪ (Finset.image (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd.val else c.fst.val)
      (Finset.filter (fun c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) S.toFinset)).toSet := h₈
    have h₁₀ : Finset.card (Finset.filter (fun c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) S.toFinset) ≤ S.length := by
      apply Finset.card_filter_le
    have h₁₁ : Finset.card (Finset.image (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd.val else c.fst.val)
      (Finset.filter (fun c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) S.toFinset)) ≤ S.length := by
      apply Finset.card_image_le
    have h₁₂ : (({k.val} ∪ (Finset.image (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd.val else c.fst.val)
      (Finset.filter (fun c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) S.toFinset)).toSet)).card ≤ 1 + S.length := by
      simp [Set.card_union_le]
    have h₁₃ : n ≤ 1 + S.length := by
      calc
        n = (after S) k).card := by rw [h₁]; simp
        _ ≤ (({k.val} ∪ (Finset.image (fun c => if c.fst = k then c.snd.val else c.fst.val)
          (Finset.filter (fun c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) S.toFinset)).toSet)).card := Set.card_mono h₉
        _ ≤ 1 + S.length := h₁₂
    linarith
  linarith

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h₁
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
    apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt
    · apply Nat.zero_le
    · apply Nat.lt_succ_self
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, (after (S.take i)) k ⊆ (after (S.take (i + 1))) k := by
    intro i
    apply makeCalls_monotone
  have h₄ : (after S) k = List.foldl (fun s c => updateState s c) (initialState n) S k := rfl
  have h₅ : (List.foldl (fun s c => updateState s c) (initialState n) S) k = univ := h₁.symm ▸ rfl
  have h₆ : ∀ T, (after T) k ⊆ Finset.univ := by
    intro T
    apply Finset.subset_univ

  have h₈ : Finset.card (after S k) = n := by

    simp
  have h₉ : Finset.card ((initialState n) k) = 1 := by

    intro i
    apply Finset.card_mono
    apply h₃
  have h₁₁ : ∀ i, Finset.card (after (S.take (i + 1)) k) ≤ Finset.card (after (S.take i) k) + 1 := by
    intro i
    cases S.drop i with

    | cons c cs =>

      apply Finset.card_insert_le
  have h₁₂ : Finset.card (after S k) ≤ Finset.card ((initialState n) k) + S.length := by
    induction S with
    | nil => simp [h₇, h₈]
    | cons c cs IH =>
      simp_all [Nat.succ_le_succ_iff]
  linarith

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, (after (S.take i)) k ⊆ (after (S.take (i + 1))) k := by
    intro i
    apply gossipMonotone
  have h₄ : (after S) k = List.foldl (fun s c => gossip s c) (initialState n) S k := rfl
  have h₅ : (List.foldl (fun s c => gossip s c) (initialState n) S) k = univ := h₁
  have h₆ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₇ : ∀ s c, (gossip s c) k ⊇ s k := by
    intro s c
    cases' c with a b
    simp [gossip, Function.update]
    by_cases h₈ : k = a <;> by_cases h₉ : k = b <;> simp_all
  have h₈ : (after S) k ⊇ (initialState n) k := by
    induction S with
    | nil => simp
    | cons c S ih =>
      simp [after, makeCalls, List.foldl]
      apply Set.Subset.trans ih
      apply h₇
  have h₉ : {k} ⊆ univ := Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr (Fin.mem_univ k)
  have h₁₀ : (after S) k = univ := h₁
  have h₁₁ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₁₂ : (after S) k ≠ (initialState n) k := by
    simp [h₁, h₁₁]
    exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr (Nat.zero_lt_succ _)
  have h₁₃ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h₁₄
    have h₁₅ : (after S) k ⊆ Finset.univ := by
      apply Finset.subset_univ
    have h₁₆ : (after S) k.card ≤ n := by
      apply Finset.card_le_card h₁₅
    have h₁₇ : (after S) k.card = n := by
      rw [h₁]
      simp
    have h₁₈ : n ≤ n := by linarith
    have h₁₉ : (initialState n) k.card = 1 := by
      simp
    have h₂₀ : ∀ i, (after (S.take i)) k.card ≤ (after (S.take (i + 1))) k.card := by
      intro i
      apply Finset.card_mono
      apply h₃
    have h₂₁ : (after S) k.card ≤ 1 + S.length := by
      induction S with
      | nil => simp [h₁₉]
      | cons c S ih =>
        simp [after, makeCalls, List.foldl] at *
        cases' c with a b
        simp [gossip, Function.update]
        by_cases h₂₂ : k = a <;> by_cases h₂₃ : k = b <;> simp_all
        <;> omega
    omega
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h₁

        -- This approach is too vague; instead use known result:
    sorry

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ s ∈ S, ∃ i j, s = ⟨i, j⟩ := by
    intro s hs
    cases s
    exact ⟨_, _, rfl⟩
  have h₄ : ∀ t : List (Call n), (after t) k ⊆ Set.univ := by
    intro t
    apply Set.Subset.univ
  have h₅ : (after S) k = (initialState n) k ∪ (⋃ c ∈ S, {c.fst, c.snd}) := by
    induction S with
    | nil => simp [after, makeCalls, initialState]
    | cons c cs ih =>
      simp [after, makeCalls, List.take_cons, List.drop_cons, List.length_cons] at *
      rw [ih]
      ext x
      constructor <;> intro hx <;> simp_all [Set.mem_union, Set.mem_insert_iff]
  rw [h₁] at h₅
  have h₆ : Set.univ = {k} ∪ (⋃ c ∈ S, {c.fst, c.snd}) := by
    rw [← h₅, h₂]
  have h₇ : Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)) ≤ 1 + S.length * 2 := by
    calc
      Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)) = n := by simp
      _ ≤ 1 + S.length * 2 := by
        have h₈ : (⋃ c ∈ S, {c.fst, c.snd}) ⊆ Set.univ := by
          apply Set.Subset.univ
        have h₉ : Set.ncard (⋃ c ∈ S, {c.fst, c.snd}) ≤ S.length * 2 := by
          apply Set.ncard_bUnion_le
          intro c hc
          simp [Set.ncard_insert, Set.ncard_singleton]
        have h₁₀ : Set.ncard Set.univ = n := by simp
        have h₁₁ : Set.ncard ({k} ∪ (⋃ c ∈ S, {c.fst, c.snd})) ≤ 1 + S.length * 2 := by
          calc
            Set.ncard ({k} ∪ (⋃ c ∈ S, {c.fst, c.snd})) ≤ Set.ncard {k} + Set.ncard (⋃ c ∈ S, {c.fst, c.snd}) := by
              apply Set.ncard_union_le
            _ = 1 + Set.ncard (⋃ c ∈ S, {c.fst, c.snd}) := by simp
            _ ≤ 1 + S.length * 2 := by linarith
        linarith
  have h₈ : n ≤ 1 + S.length * 2 := by
    simpa using h₇
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ (initialState n) k := by
    apply gossip_monotonic
  have h₅ : (after S).length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply gossip_expert_lower_bound
    exact h
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Finset.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k ≠ (initialState n) k := by
    simp [h₁, h₂]
    exact Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr (by omega)
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
    apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt
    · apply Finset.card_le_card
      apply Finset.subset_univ
    · simp [h₁]
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ s ∈ S, s.fst ≠ s.snd := by
    intro s hs
    -- This would normally require additional assumptions about calls,
    -- but for the gossip problem, we assume no self-calls.
    -- However, since this isn't formalized here, we proceed differently.
    admit
  -- Instead, use the standard argument: to learn n-1 other secrets,
  -- k must participate in at least n-1 calls, and each call can
  -- transmit at most one new secret to k.
  have h₄ : v S k ≥ n - 1 := by
    -- Each call involving k can add at most one new secret to k's knowledge.
    -- Since k starts with 1 secret and ends with n secrets, needs n-1 calls.
    admit
  have h₅ : v S k ≤ S.length := by
    -- Each call counted in v S k is a distinct element of S.
    apply Nat.le_of_sub_nonneg
    simp [v, List.countP_le_length]
  linarith

have h₁ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h
  have h₂ : (initialState n) k = {k.val} := rfl
  have h₃ : ∀ i, i ∈ (after S) k ↔ i < n := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₄ : (after S) k ⊇ Set.univ := by
    simp [h₁]
  have h₅ : (after S) k = Set.univ := h₁
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h_gt
    have h₇ : S.length < n - 1 := h_gt
    have h₈ : (after S) k ⊆ {i | i ≤ k.val + S.length} := by
      induction S with
      | nil => simp [initialState, makeCalls]
      | cons c S ih =>
        simp [makeCalls, List.foldl, Function.comp] at *
        cases c
        rename_i f s
        have h₉ : (after (c :: S)) k = (after S) k ∪ (after S) f ∪ (after S) s := by
          sorry
        sorry
    sorry
  omega
